---
title: "Hyla_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(ggplot2)
library(lawstat)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
data.frame(HylaMeta)
#View(HylaMeta)
```

## Graph

```{r}

boxplot(HylaMeta$Metamorph_time ~ HylaMeta$Tox_conc, col = "lightcyan2", staplelwd = 1.4, whisklwd = 1.4, outlwd = 1.4, frame = FALSE, xlab = "Toxicant Concentration", ylab = "Metamorphosis Time (Days)", main = "Nitrate Effect on Metamorphosis")

```

## Signifigance

```{r}
shapiro.test(HylaMeta$Metamorph_time)
levene.test(HylaMeta$Metamorph_time, HylaMeta$Tox_conc)
```

```{r}
kruskal.test(Metamorph_time ~ Tox_conc, data = HylaMeta)
SigM <- kruskal.test(Metamorph_time ~ Tox_conc, data = HylaMeta)
```

## Post HOC

```{r}
pw <- pairwise.t.test(HylaMeta$Metamorph_time, 
                      HylaMeta$Tox_conc, 
                      p.adjust.method = "bonferroni")
pw

```

## Tidy

```{r}
tidy(pw)
```
